text: I feel the hum of quiet concentration as I stand outside the glass room, observing people in discussion or absorbed in their tasks. The sterile, ordered environment is calming yet brings a sense of separation—am I observer or participant? Stepping into the second space, color and curiosity envelop me. The bold wall, vibrant with "R+D" and readouts about research, makes me ponder the ceaseless forward motion of human creativity. Here, innovation feels tangible, and I am both inspired and slightly in awe of how knowledge evolves in the collective mind.
